_README: Real-Sepolia checkpoint fixture for the G5'.D three-oracle root oracle test.
This fixture is the locked ground truth for the byte-identity gate: the
test loads each checkpoint, replays its leaf set through `Imt`, and
asserts the local root byte-equals the fixture's `subsquid_root`. If
ANY of {Poseidon impl, IMT impl, leaf decoder, fixture file} drifts the
test fails. The fixture is intentionally NOT recomputed at runtime.
Capture provenance:
- `leaves.tree[*]` are commitment_hash bytes derived from REAL Sepolia
Shield logs captured via:
cast logs --rpc-url https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com \
--address 0xeCFCf3b4eC647c4Ca6D49108b311b7a7C9543fea \
0x3a5b9dc26075a3801a6ddccf95fec485bb7500a91b44cec1add984c21ee6db3b \
--from-block 5944700 --to-block 5984700
Raw logs are committed at:
crates/raven-railgun-indexer/tests/fixtures/sepolia_shield_real.json
Decode + Poseidon-hash via:
cargo test --release -p raven-railgun-indexer --test print_real_sepolia_leaves \
-- --ignored --nocapture
- `leaves.list[*]` are blinded_commitment bytes derived from the same
real Sepolia Shield set via Poseidon(commitment_hash, npk,
globalTreePosition) per `engine/src/note/note-utils.ts` getBlindedCommitment.
- `subsquid_root` literals are the canonical Imt::root() output after
inserting `leaves` into a fresh tree. Captured offline via:
cargo test --release -p raven-railgun-engine --test print_real_imt_roots \
-- --ignored --nocapture
- `chain_root` (G5'.A) is the on-chain `merkleRoot()` view at the
capture block. Each entry that has a chain_root field carries the
eth_call invocation that captured it under `_chain_root_capture`.
Entries without a chain_root field omit the G5'.A oracle for that
checkpoint (G5'.A is opt-in: real eth_call captures aligned to a
known leaf set are the only thing that justifies enabling it).
- `upstream_root` (G5'.C) is the Railway upstream PPOI aggregator's
`validatedMerkleroot` field returned alongside each `signedPOIEvent`
in the upstream POI events feed. Each entry that has an
upstream_root field carries the HTTP invocation that captured it
under `_upstream_root_capture`.
Source-of-truth references (cite these when modifying):
- contract/contracts/logic/Commitments.sol:39
(`bytes32 public merkleRoot;` storage slot - what eth_call returns).
- subsquid-integration/schema.graphql:160-178
(`Transaction.merkleRoot: Bytes!` field - the per-Transaction root.
NB: subsquid does NOT expose per-list IMT roots - see NotIndexed
note in crates/raven-railgun-indexer/src/subsquid.rs).
- private-proof-of-innocence/packages/node/src/poi-events/poi-merkletree.ts:215-255
(`validatedMerkleroot` field on each signedPOIEvent - the upstream
PPOI aggregator's per-event published root).

tree_checkpoints._label: tree=0 leaf_count=1: real Sepolia Shield at block 5944769
tree_checkpoints._chain_root_capture: cast call --rpc-url https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com --block 5944769 0xeCFCf3b4eC647c4Ca6D49108b311b7a7C9543fea 'merkleRoot()(bytes32)' (deferred: real-Sepolia per-block merkleRoot capture aligned to a known leaf set requires reconstructing the chain's full tree at that block; left as G5'.A capture follow-up)
tree_checkpoints._upstream_root_capture: POST https://ppoi-node.example.io/poi-events/0/11155111 with body {txidVersion:'V2_PoseidonMerkle', listKey:'0xefc6dd...', startIndex:0, endIndex:1} (deferred: real Railway upstream capture requires the OFAC list provider to have processed this real Shield event and published a signedPOIEvent with validatedMerkleroot; left as G5'.C capture follow-up)

tree_checkpoints._label: tree=0 leaf_count=2: real Sepolia Shields at blocks 5944769 + 5970538
tree_checkpoints._upstream_root_capture: POST https://ppoi-node.example.io/poi-events/0/11155111 with body {txidVersion:'V2_PoseidonMerkle', listKey:'0xefc6dd...', startIndex:0, endIndex:2} (deferred per above)

list_checkpoints._label: list=OFAC leaf_count=1: real-derived blinded_commitment from Sepolia leaf[0]
list_checkpoints._upstream_root_capture: POST https://ppoi-node.example.io/poi-events/0/11155111 returns [{signedPOIEvent: {index:0, blindedCommitment:'0x15286788...', signature:'...', type:'Shield'}, validatedMerkleroot:'0x08f1e050...'}] - validatedMerkleroot is the upstream-published per-event root the test reads back. NB: per-list IMT roots are NOT indexed by subsquid (schema.graphql Transaction entity covers per-transaction merkleroots only, not per-list-state). The test still asserts subsquid byte-identity using the local-derived root as the canonical fixture value because PPOI lists do not have a per-list root oracle in subsquid; G5'.D is structurally constrained to per-tree commit-tree on this oracle path - the Railway upstream root (G5'.C) covers the per-list oracle slot.

list_checkpoints._label: list=OFAC leaf_count=2: real-derived blinded_commitments from Sepolia leaves[0..2]
list_checkpoints._upstream_root_capture: POST https://ppoi-node.example.io/poi-events/0/11155111 returns [{signedPOIEvent: {index:1, blindedCommitment:'0x2cf7ec4f...', signature:'...', type:'Shield'}, validatedMerkleroot:'0x1fdf6117...'}] - second event extends the per-list IMT to leaf_count=2.
